label: Pleiades Ancient World Gazetteer
description: ~38,000 ancient Greek, Roman, and Mediterranean world places — cities, temples, roads, ports, theatres, aqueducts, sanctuaries, and more. Includes coordinates, place types, and time period coverage from the Archaic through Late Antique periods.
attribution: Pleiades Project, Tom Elliott et al. — https://pleiades.stoa.org/
